svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="J4rOrjZ5uEIYS-cAwV19"> <mxGraphModel dx="703" dy="970" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
!theme blueprint
skinparam sequenceArrowThickness 2
skinparam participantPadding 20

title <b>RAG Processing Sequence</b>

actor User
participant UI #3498DB
participant Backend #2ECC71
participant AI #F39C12
participant VectorDB #9B59B6
participant LLM #E67E22
participant DB #1ABC9C

== Upload Phase ==
User -> UI : Upload Contract
UI -> Backend : POST /upload
Backend -> Backend : Extract + Chunk
Backend -> AI : Send chunks
AI -> VectorDB : Store embeddings

== Analysis Phase ==
User -> UI : Request Analysis
UI -> Backend : POST /analyze
Backend -> AI : Send query
AI -> VectorDB : Search similar chunks
VectorDB --> AI : Top-k chunks
AI -> LLM : Generate summary + risk
LLM --> AI : Response
AI --> Backend : Result

== Storage ==
Backend -> DB : Save result
Backend --> UI : Return output
UI --> User : Display results

@enduml
",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="s31tFLLTC1g4qOQDU-kv-5"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="810" width="765" x="20" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

svg.style: width: 765px; height: 810px; background: rgb(0, 49, 83); font-family: initial;
svg.title: RAG Processing Sequence
